revisedPrompt: Create a polished grid-art illustration of a tranquil ornamental pond inspired by classical Chinese and Japanese aesthetics, presented as a cohesive tiled/grid composition. Include luminous koi fish swimming beneath clear teal water, lotus flowers and broad lily pads, elegant reeds, smooth stones, a small arched wooden bridge, subtle ripples, drifting petals, and delicate reflections of willow branches and traditional garden architecture. Blend refined East Asian ink-wash composition with high-end animated-film background polish: clean stylized forms, graceful linework, layered depth, soft atmospheric lighting, rich jade, turquoise, coral, and muted gold palette, subtle texture, cinematic detail, and harmonious negative space. The grid structure should be integrated artistically through square tile-like sections and geometric water patterns rather than looking like a UI. No text, no logos, no symbols resembling branding, no watermark, no border.
prompt: for the grid art style but it should be a pond type with chinese, japanese art-style. finish them with the animation and imagegen polish. Don't use any branding on the final rendered image. only the art style

integrationReview.role: Replaceable decorative atmosphere behind the intro copy and original foreground illustration only; never part of an active or success board.
integrationReview.stateBoundary: The image has empty alt text and aria-hidden=true. It carries no prompt, control, answer, target quantity, endpoint, trace, outcome, or completion state, and deleting it leaves the exercise semantics intact.
integrationReview.safeCrop: Prototype.svelte uses object-fit: cover and object-position: center top in a shallow vertically masked strip. Desktop renders the strip at approximately 760.2 x 189.9 CSS pixels with 22% opacity; the 320px viewport renders it at 302 x 92 CSS pixels with 18% opacity. The perspective-tile field is not rendered in the active mathematical corridor because the asset is absent from every active and success SVG.
integrationReview.noBrandingReview: Manual pixel review found no readable text, logo, watermark, trademark, title treatment, copied character, branding, or recognizable source composition. Visible content is generic pond, bridge, pavilion, willow, stone, lotus, reed, blossom, and koi atmosphere.
integrationReview.motionRelationship: The generated image remains static. Purposeful motion is confined to original SVG frog, trace, landing, discrepancy-entry, arrival, and water-ripple layers; reduced-motion removes those animations without changing state.
integrationReview.desktopAnd320Review: Headless visual review at 1440px and 320px found no horizontal overflow, console error, or page error. The crop stays behind intro content and never obscures a playable grid, label, or control.
technicalEvidence: npm --prefix experiments run check: passed with 0 Svelte errors/warnings and catalog validation
SMOKE_EXERCISES=EX-0004 npm --prefix experiments run test:smoke: passed all 8 tests
Rendered geometry: 65.5px square desktop cells, 24.5px square 320px cells, and 44.1px square 320px tutorial hit target
integrationReview.claimBoundary: This review records asset role, crop safety, operability, and geometry only. It does not claim learning efficacy, accessibility equivalence, MES-02 approval, or promotion readiness.
